subject: Sample Shipment - Miles Picual EVOO 250 ml
body_preview: Please confirm the six 250 ml sample tins will ship this week ahead of our tasting on the 15th.

subject: Re: Albion Order - Hojiblanca 500 ml
body_preview: Sounds good. I will confirm the pallet quantity for the Hojiblanca 500 ml after our call.

subject: Labeling & Provenance Specs
body_preview: Attached are the German labeling requirements for the single-estate provenance statement.

subject: FedEx Tracking - Hamburg Shipment 7741
body_preview: Your shipment to Feinkost Adler GmbH in Hamburg is now out for delivery.

subject: Pricing for autumn delivery?
body_preview: Could you share your per-case pricing for the Miles single-estate range for an autumn delivery?

subject: Delivery schedule confirmation needed
body_preview: Please confirm the London delivery window so we can book the inbound dock slot.

subject: Re: Packaging - gift tin proof approved
body_preview: The gift tin proof for the 250 ml looks excellent. You have our approval to proceed.

subject: Tasting notes from the sample batch
body_preview: Our buyers rated the Picual very highly. Full tasting notes attached for your reference.

subject: Re: Pricing for autumn delivery
body_preview: Attached is our per-case price list for the Miles single-estate range for autumn delivery.

subject: Introduction - Nordic Deli Import
body_preview: We are expanding our Spanish EVOO selection and would love to discuss the Miles label.

subject: Organic certification renewal documents
body_preview: Please find the renewal checklist for the March 2027 organic inspection attached.

subject: Irrigation update from the grove
body_preview: Drip lines on the south terraces are repaired. Soil moisture is holding well after the dry spell.

subject: Cooperative assembly agenda - October
body_preview: The agenda for the 22 October general assembly is ready. Please review the pricing motion.

subject: Alpenfein - Switzerland import inquiry
body_preview: Could you send availability for the Picual 500 ml for a first trial order to Zurich?

subject: Re: Delivery schedule confirmation needed
body_preview: The London delivery window is confirmed for the week of the 6th. Diego will share the booking ref.

subject: Export paperwork for UK shipment 7752
body_preview: I have prepared the EUR.1 movement certificate and commercial invoice for the Thames order.

subject: Thames Provisions - listing proposal
body_preview: We would like to list the Miles Hojiblanca 500 ml across our flagship stores this autumn.

subject: Field notes - canopy and pest check
body_preview: Tree health looks strong this season. No sign of olive fly yet. I suggest a monitoring trap review.

subject: QA - acidity results for sample batch
body_preview: Lab results confirm free acidity at 0.2 percent, well within extra virgin parameters. Excellent.

subject: Re: Jaen fair - shared coop stand
body_preview: We have booked a shared stand at the Jaen fair on 21 November. Bring Miles bottles to showcase.
